raw_consumer_statement: This was for a cab fare in XXXX XXXX. I was not given a receipt. The driver told me the card declined but obviously it was charged {$240.00}. He then demanded {$100.00} U.S. cash which I had to give him to get my luggage out of his cab. It should have been a {$10.00} U.S. fare total. I do not have documents. This vendor needs to be flagged as well. They are thieves! I was leaving the country so they had an easy target. I refuse to pay this charge. It can stay on my account until I close my account. I totally dispute this charge. Please go after this vendor!
